quoteDescription: 70x110MM DESTINATION LABELS - 3 KINDS - NSW PICK UP 5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) MEL 5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) BNE 5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) VIC COUNTRY
lineDescription: 70x110MM DESTINATION LABELS - 4 KINDS - QLD DELIVERY||Size: 70mm x 110mm||Material: Semi Gloss Paper Permanent||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: OS0023(6,4)(6,3)2mm Rectangle||Provided on 40mm Cores||Finishing: GLOSS VARNISH||HAND APPLIED||Supply: ROLLS OF 500||5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) MEL||5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) BNE||5 Cartons - 100 x rolls (50,000) VIC COUNTRY||
deliveryToAddress: PICK UP ||3-5/2 Burrows Road South ||St Peters NSW 2044
